footer.brand_description: Joint operation of Macrogen Spain and Macrogen Chile, serving the Ibero-American scientific community from two hubs: Madrid and Santiago.
footer.rights: © 2026 Macrogen Iberoamérica · Agency of Macrogen Inc. · All rights reserved.

hero_index.eyebrow: One Team · One Macrogen · Madrid + Santiago
hero_index.lead: We are the joint operation of Macrogen Spain and Macrogen Chile: two hubs, one network, serving the scientific community of Spain, Portugal, Chile and Peru. Over 18,000 clients in 150 countries trust the global Macrogen platform — now with local support from Madrid and Santiago, in your language and time zone. Billing in USD or EUR.

hero_nosotros.lead: Macrogen Iberoamérica is the joint regional operation of Macrogen Spain and Macrogen Chile, serving the scientific community of Spain, Portugal, Chile and Peru.

hero_servicios.lead: From a single Sanger reaction to WGS cohorts of thousands of samples. One window, one global network.

hero_contacto.lead: Bioinformatics teams in Madrid and Santiago, ready to listen. We respond to quotes in under 24 business hours, in your language and time zone.

hero_faq.lead: Quick answers to the most common questions about logistics, sample preparation, technical concepts and Macrogen Iberoamérica services.

hero_blog.lead: Tutorials, use cases, technical guides and updates from the Macrogen network — written in Spanish by our teams in Madrid and Santiago, and by international contributors.

hero_newsletter.lead: An edition curated by our team: featured papers, bioinformatics tutorials, technical offers and updates from the global Macrogen network.

pillars.section_subtitle: Globally standardized technology. Locally delivered service.
pillars.speed_body: International logistics with Chilexpress, DHL and FedEx. Industry-leading turnaround times thanks to the global Macrogen hub network.
pillars.precision_body: ISO 9001, ISO 13485 and ISO 27001 certifications. Official Certified Service Provider (CSP) status for Illumina and 10x Genomics.
pillars.connectivity_body: The same data a researcher receives in Seoul or New York arrives at your lab in Santiago, through our local portal.

workflow.section_subtitle: Standardized workflow, traceable and auditable at every stage.
workflow.step1_body: Request a quote online, prepare your sample following our guides, and we ship to the nearest hub.
workflow.step2_body: Nucleic acid quality control, library preparation with validated Illumina/PacBio/ONT kits.
workflow.step3_body: NovaSeq X Plus, PacBio Revio or specialized platforms depending on your application.
workflow.step4_body: GATK Best Practices pipelines, Bioconductor and scientific reports in Spanish. Data via secure portal.

cta_block.title: Have a project in mind?
cta_block.lead: Talk to our bioinformatics teams in Madrid or Santiago. Free initial consultation.

order_block.title: Skip the quote and place your order directly.
order_block.lead: If you already know which service you need, access the official Macrogen ordering portal and start your request online right now.
order_block.trust: Secure portal · 24/7 access · full sample traceability

newsletter_form.label: Your email
newsletter_form.note: We'll send a confirmation email. You can unsubscribe anytime.

form.section_lead: Tell us the preliminary details of your project. We'll respond within 24 business hours from the hub serving your country.
form.field_message_placeholder: Sample type, quantity, target budget, desired timeline, any question...
form.country_note: Select your country so your request reaches the right hub.

service_card.wgs_body: Full genome coverage to detect SNPs, InDels, CNVs and structural variants at the highest possible resolution.
service_card.wes_body: Targeted capture of the coding region with Agilent SureSelect V8. >100x coverage for clinical diagnosis.
service_card.rnaseq_body: Complete differential expression analysis, including volcano plots and GO/KEGG functional enrichment.
service_card.singlecell_body: Single-cell resolution with the 10x Genomics Chromium platform. Transcriptomic and multiomic profiling.
service_card.metagenoma_body: 16S/18S/ITS profiling by ASV (DADA2) or shotgun metagenomics for complex microbial communities.
service_card.sanger_body: The gold standard for validation. Standard, identification, fragment analysis and customized sequencing services.

promo_jun.title: Exclusive 10% discount
promo_jun.subtitle: On all quotes received during June 2026
promo_jun.valid_until: Valid June 1–30, 2026 · Request your quote at macrogen-es.com

promo_banner.title: We'll apply your discount
promo_banner.subtitle: Code {code} · 10% on your first June 2026 quote
